task: Finalize the GeoAware UI repair after Project Architect screenshot review

fixes.requirement: Render Ọ̀nàSafe as one continuous Yoruba wordmark. The initial Ọ̀ must never detach from nàSafe.
Remove public-facing OpenCrashMap inspiration or attribution text. Retain ETL GIS Consulting LLC and GeoAware Core governance only.
On load, render every accepted simulated fatal record, show displayed deaths, occupied bins, daytime and nighttime totals, and a clickable segment ranking.
Use actual GeoJSON coordinates for displayed density groups and a segment projection only for bin membership. Never manufacture records.

acceptance: No OpenCrashMap promotional attribution is visible.
Initial data totals are non-zero when the governed demo dataset loads.
Map figures, summary metrics and segment ranking react to filters and bin size.
Quality gate and Codex review pass before merge.
